title: PHY: GNSS-PPS coordinated capacity scheduling
description: Optional CCP v1 scheduled mode for dense LICHEN deployments. Every scheduled participant requires GNSS with hardware PPS; nodes without valid PPS remain fully functional on baseline CH0 CAD/CSMA and may use unscheduled channel rendezvous. The accepted DODAG root issues root-signed, recipient-paged leased cells binding slot, channel, transmitter, and receiver. Version 1 permits concurrent distinct-channel cells with disjoint endpoints, forbids same-channel spatial reuse, requires CAD in every cell, and falls back to CH0 on invalid time, holdover expiry, or lease loss. Production implementation is gated by deterministic simulator evidence in i9r0.2 and da2q.3.
design: Normative protocol is spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md. GPS system time plus hardware PPS defines ASN; dynamic root assignments and exact signed control formats replace gateway beacons and static hash slots.
acceptance_criteria: Spec issue closed; both simulator gates pass with canonical vectors/results; only then Python, Rust, and Zephyr implementation may begin.
